phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the Old Town
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous m'indiquer le chemin vers la Vieille Ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo man-dee-KAY luh shuh-MAN vair lah VYAY VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Geneva's Old Town sits on a hilltop on the left bank of the Rhône; the climb up the cobbled streets is steep but rewarding.

responses.english: Go up the street, straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: mohn-TAY lah ROO, seh too DRWAH
responses.french: Montez la rue, c'est tout droit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the old town streets are steep
phrases.text_local: Les rues de la vieille ville sont-elles pentues ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay ROO duh lah vyey VEEL sohn-TEL pahn-TOO
phrases.cultural_note: Geneva's Old Town sits on a hill. Some streets are steep and cobblestoned, so comfortable shoes are recommended.

responses.english: Yes, a bit. Wear comfortable shoes.
responses.phonetic: wee, uhn PUH. por-TAY day shoh-SOOR kohn-for-TAHBL
responses.french: Oui, un peu. Portez des chaussures confortables.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the old town streets are pedestrian
phrases.cultural_note: Most of the historic centre is pedestrianised, making it pleasant to wander; a few streets allow resident vehicles only.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about a good restaurant in the area
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me recommander un bon restaurant dans la Vieille Ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh ruh-koh-mohn-DAY un bohn res-toh-ROHN don lah VYAY VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: The area around the Grand-Rue and the Place du Bourg-de-Four has numerous cafés and restaurants serving Swiss and international cuisine.

responses.phonetic: zhuh voo kohn-SAY lah PLAHS doo boor-duh-FOOR
responses.french: Je vous conseille la Place du Bourg-de-Four.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of a museum
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les heures d'ouverture de ce musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel SOHN lay ZUR doo-VAIR-tur duh suh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Many Geneva museums are free on the first Sunday of each month — a popular local tradition.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-REHR sohn ah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée.
